name: ospec-lite-codex
description: Codex companion plugin for repositories that use OSpec Lite.

interface.shortDescription: Guide Codex through the ospec-lite workflow.
interface.longDescription: Repo-local Codex companion plugin for OSpec Lite. It teaches Codex when to initialize a repository, how to follow profile-backed authoring packs, and how to use OSpec Lite's lightweight change workflow without replacing the oslite CLI.
defaultPrompt: Initialize this repo with OSpec Lite.
Check OSpec Lite status and missing markers.
Continue the profile docs and run oslite docs verify.
